details.test: Task 1: Recessed lighting quote with Saturday 9-11 window
Task 2: Earliest weekday evening EV charger install within 14 days
Task 3: Cheapest whole-home surge package (5+ years) added to estimate
Task 4: Panel upgrade quote referencing Springfield testimonial
Task 5: Apply first-time residential safety inspection promo code during booking
Task 6: Service request in zone with lowest trip fee for ZIP 94110
Task 7: Home office wiring estimate with 3 services and <= 6 labor hours
Task 8: Contact form for breaker keeps tripping, referencing FAQ guidance
Task 9: Annual maintenance plan under $250/year for apartment < 1500 sq ft
